response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level role. While the technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes) far exceed requirements, there is severe seniority mismatch, likely salary expectation gap, and high flight risk. Berlin-based which works for on-site requirement, but no evidence of renewable energy or construction tech domain interest.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS experience exceeding requirements
Berlin-based, supporting the on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated learning ability across web, mobile, embedded, and AI tooling
concerns: Massive seniority over-qualification (Staff/Senior level for junior role)
High attrition risk — likely to leave once a senior role appears
No PostgreSQL experience listed (uses MongoDB); no Nest.js experience
